name: IPR-3A "Foundry"
description: The Foundry introduces laser powder bed fusion at scale, with a 4 m × 4 m × 2 m build volume capable of simultaneously printing multiple complex parts. A 12 kW fibre laser array scans across a spread powder bed at high speed; the sintered layer is indexed down and a fresh powder layer is spread for the next pass. The process handles superalloys, titanium, and advanced ceramics with equal facility, enabling the fabrication of pressure vessels, pump casings, and high-precision gearboxes needed for tier-3 refinery and mining equipment. Includes an integrated post-processing robotic cell for support removal and heat treatment.
